title: I cant figure out how to open my board
excerpt: I feel like this is kinda silly but I can’t figure out how to open a board.  I’m new and just need a kickstart

posts.author: avi_220 (Avianna)
posts.cookedHtml: I feel like this is kinda silly but I can’t figure out how to open a board. I’m new and just need a kickstart

posts.author: TRB-monday.com (Talia)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @avi_220! Did you figure it out? You can create a new board by clicking the blue plus on the upper lefthand side of your screen or select existing boards by clicking on their name in your lefthand pane

Let me know what you think!
